'''Illiet''' was a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] [[Dodecian]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] who was in command of [[Yag-prime]], the space station orbiting [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. He had mathematical symbols painted on his exoskeleton, indicating his high rank among the Givin people.

[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Anakin Solo]], and [[Tahiri Veila]] warned Illiet about a secret plot to lower the planetary defenses of Yag'Dhul in preparation for an invasion of the system. The plot against the [[Body Calculus]] was thwarted, though Illiet remained apparently unaware that one of his subordinates was a disguised [[Nom Anor]]. After weighing all the factors, Illiet and the Givin people decided to fight against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion of their system in the [[Battle of Yag'Dhul (26 ABY)|Battle of Yag'Dhul]]. Aware that the space station was almost certainly doomed, he evacuated all unnecessary personnel and offered the use of a Givin ship to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. He remained on the station during the battle. It is unknown whether the Yuuzhan Vong destroyed the Yag'Dhul station before retreating, but it was heavily damaged in the fighting.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
